en.value: The project focuses on two major components Water Supply and Agriculture. The project also focused on COVID response.Water supplyScheme-wise preliminary community mapping with water supply scheme beneficiariesFormation of Project-Beneficiary Coordination Committee during each year of the projectFormation of Water User's Committee (WUC) for each water supply schemeScheme-wise drawing of community map with WUCSigning of agreement between WUC and land owners of source and reservoir tanksFormulation of final construction plan with WUCsSigning of agreement between ISAP and WUCsConstruction of Water Supply SchemesTraining for WUC management committee on post-construction  operations and maintenanceTechnical Training for repair, maintenance and operation of the WSS to village maintenance workersHygiene knowledge improvement trainingSocial Audit, inauguration and handover of the WSSPost construction monitoring of WSS for operation and technical advice AgricultureFormation, registration and/or activation of 25 farmer groupsFacilitate monthly meeting of FGsNursery preparation training for summer season cropTraining on cultivation technology for summer season vegetable cropNursery preparation training for off season tomato inside plastic houseTraining on cultivation of off season tomato inside plastic houseNursery preparation training for off season cauliflower and onionCultivation training for off season cauliflower and onionNursery preparation training for winter season cropTraining on cultivation technology of winter season vegetableSoil test training for ISAP technical teamSoil test training for farmersOrientation on soil test resultTraining for leader farmersTraining on FYM improvement and urine collection trainingTechnical monitoring and mobile teaching at farmer's fieldsOperation of a model demonstration farm (Mini farm)Internal technical training for project team membersReview and reflection workshopConstruction of 145 plastic houses for tomato cultivation, 80 improved  farm-yard sheds, 100 plastic ponds for irrigationTechnical trainings for agro-vetsAgro business planning workshopBook keeping training for farmersFormation of Marketing and Planning Committee (MPC) and training to MPCRadio broadcast of vegetable price and technical adviceEstablishment of collection centersKrishi Mela to connect producers and trader in KathmanduTraining on cooperative management to local cooperativesExposure visit to successful farmers and sharing in FGsLocal representative visit to FG field and public hearings (Social Audit) COVID responseEstablishment/Reinforcement of 4 full equipped isolation centers in Balefi rural municipality, Panchpokhari Thangpal rural municipality, Sunkoshi rural municipality and Tripura Sundari rural municipality

executing_agency: Ministry of Women, Children and Senior Citizens

en.full: Project for Improving Water Access and Agriculture Income
